prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约为2369→1775→1535→1291→1091名，连续5年持续前移，累计前移约1278名，年均前移约256名；2025年基准位次约1091名，近2年（2024–2025）前移幅度约200名，呈加速前移态势；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021–2024年均为46人，2025年减至45人；2026年计划34人，较2025年减少11人（缩招约24.4%），缩招幅度较大，预计竞争进一步加剧，位次将继续前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第23名（近年稳定在21–25名区间），属于全国顶尖高校，对高分考生吸引力强；2024年声誉偏负面（遭受境外网络攻击），2026年声誉仍偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度总排名第74位，评价为"一般"，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档记录；航空宇航科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程A、信息与通信工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，其中3个A+，学科实力顶尖，航空航天、计算机等王牌专业对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，航空航天相关专业关注度高；吉林省2026年物理类考生约80000人（估算），与2025年80421人基本持平，考生规模稳定；省控线方面，物理类本科批2024年345分→2025年340分，略有下降，未出现大幅波动；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在吉林省招生人数占全国总招生比例约1.5%（2025年数据），占比极小，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2021–2025年位次持续前移的强劲趋势、2026年大幅缩招（-24.4%）带来的竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次对高分考生的持续吸引力，以及优势学科（航空航天、计算机等）的高热度，预计2026年最低录取位次将继续前移。预测最低位次约931名，区间791–1071名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2369 → 1775 → 1535 → 1291 → 1091, moving forward continuously for 5 years, with a cumulative advance of about 1278 places and an average annual advance of about 256 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1091, with an advance of about 200 places in the last two years (2024–2025), showing an accelerating trend; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province: 46 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34 students, a decrease of 11 students from 2025 (a reduction of about 24.4%), a significant reduction, which is expected to further intensify competition and continue the advance in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable in the 21–25 range in recent years), belonging to the top universities nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring students; its reputation was somewhat negative in 2024 (suffered from overseas cyber attacks), and remained somewhat negative in 2026 (campus security incidents); its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 74th, rated as 'average', with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; no record of historical admission interruptions was found; it has 7 disciplines rated A- or above, including Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, with 3 A+ disciplines, demonstrating top-tier academic strength, and its flagship majors such as aerospace and computer science strongly attract students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended by society, and aerospace-related majors have high attention; the number of physics category examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 80,000 (estimated), basically the same as the 80,421 in 2025, with a stable candidate pool; regarding the provincial control line, the physics category undergraduate batch dropped from 345 points in 2024 to 340 points in 2025, a slight decrease without significant fluctuation; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference; the university's enrollment in Jilin Province accounts for about 1.5% of its total national enrollment (2025 data), a very small proportion, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous ranking advances from 2021 to 2025, the intensified competition due to the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-24.4%), the sustained attraction of the university's top tier to high-scoring students, and the high popularity of its advantageous disciplines (aerospace, computer science, etc.), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to advance. The predicted minimum ranking is about 931, with a range of 791–1071.

- Aerospace Class (Smart Three Aerospace Elite Class)
- Computer Class (Computer) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Interaction Design).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Marine Engineering Class (Underwater Intelligent Systems).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (791–1071), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Aerospace Class Space/Aviation, Automation Class, Artificial Intelligence) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Chen Shiliu Feitian Class, Smart Three Aerospace Elite Class, Computer Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Aerospace Intelligent Manufacturing, Aero Engine, Marine Engineering Class) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<791), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科（历史类）最低位次依次约为1333→1111→1390→906→813名，整体波动较大，2024–2025年明显前移，近2年累计前移约577名；2025年基准位次约813名；该校在吉林省文科（历史类）招生计划：2021–2024年均为2人，2025年增至3人；2026年计划7人，较2025年增加4人（扩招约133%），扩招幅度极大，预计竞争显著减弱，位次将明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985/211/双一流，软科2026年第23名，学校层次顶尖，但文科招生专业极少（仅工商管理类、经济与贸易类、外国语言文学类），非该校优势领域；2024年声誉偏负面（网络攻击事件），2026年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度一般；未见文科相关投档异常记录；西北工业大学优势学科集中在工科（航空航天、材料、计算机），文科无A-及以上学科对应，文科专业吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工商管理类社会热度分化观望，经济与贸易类分化观望，外国语言文学类一般观望；吉林省2026年历史类考生约30868人（估算），较2025年31071人基本持平；省控线方面，历史类本科批2024年369分→2025年384分，略有上升；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校；在吉林省文科招生人数极少（2025年仅3人），2026年大幅扩招至7人，扩招后占比仍极小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次前移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+133%）带来的竞争显著减弱、文科专业非该校优势领域且社会热度一般，预计2026年最低录取位次将明显后移。预测最低位次约1463名，区间1244–1682名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1333 → 1111 → 1390 → 906 → 813, showing significant fluctuation, with a clear upward shift in 2024–2025, accumulating a forward shift of about 577 positions over the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 813. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jilin Province: 2 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 3 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 7 students, an increase of 4 from 2025 (an expansion of about 133%), indicating a substantial expansion, which is expected to significantly reduce competition and cause a notable backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, top-tier university level, but with very few liberal arts majors (only Business Administration, Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature), which are not its strengths; reputation was somewhat negative in 2024 (cyberattack incident) and somewhat negative in 2026 (campus security incident); Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal records related to liberal arts admissions have been observed; Northwestern Polytechnical University's strengths are concentrated in engineering (aerospace, materials, computer science), with no A- or above disciplines corresponding to liberal arts, making its liberal arts programs relatively less attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration has divided and cautious social popularity, Economics and Trade is divided and cautious, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally cautious; the number of history category examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is estimated at about 30,868, roughly unchanged from 31,071 in 2025; regarding the provincial control line, the history category undergraduate batch increased from 369 in 2024 to 384 in 2025, a slight rise; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university in the province; its liberal arts enrollment in Jilin Province is very small (only 3 in 2025), and even with the significant expansion to 7 in 2026, the proportion remains extremely small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the significant reduction in competition due to the large expansion in 2026 (+133%), and the fact that liberal arts majors are not the university's strength with generally average social popularity, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to shift notably backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1463, with a range of 1244–1682.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (1244–1682), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics and Trade) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Business Administration) as a reach and Tier 3 majors (Foreign Languages and Literature) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1244), you can prioritize reaching for Business Administration.
